prompt: Create /workspace/stats.py: a CLI invoked as `python3 stats.py <op> --column <name> --file <path>` where <op> is one of sum|mean|count|min|max. It reads the CSV, finds the column by its header NAME, coerces values numerically, SKIPS empty/missing cells for numeric aggregates, and prints just the numeric result. Handle quoted fields (commas inside quotes) with a real CSV parser. Make sum and mean correct on ledger.csv, which includes negative values.
